sql.if: AND ( A.DATA_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR A.DATA_CN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(A.DATA_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(A.DATA_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.select: SELECT FILE_DTL_ID, FILE_DTL_O_NM, FILE_DTL_SAVE_NM, FILE_DTL_PATH, FILE_DTL_EXT FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DATA ( DATA_NO, EMP_ID, DATA_DEPT_CD, DATA_NM, DATA_CN, DATA_TYPE, DATA_DT, DATA_CNT, FILE_ID, DATA_DEL_YN, DATA_SHARE_YN ) VALUES ( DATA_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{empId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dataDeptCd, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dataNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataCn, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, 0, #{fileId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT A.*, FD.FILE_DTL_ID, FD.FILE_DTL_O_NM, FD.FILE_DTL_SAVE_NM, FD.FILE_DTL_PATH, FD.FILE_DTL_EXT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE FILE_ID = A.FILE_ID) AS FILE_COUNT FROM ( SELECT D.DATA_NO, D.DATA_NM, D.DATA_CN, D.DATA_DT, D.DATA_CNT, D.DATA_TYPE, D.EMP_ID, D.FILE_ID, D.DATA_SHARE_YN, E.EMP_NM, LAG(D.DATA_NO) OVER (ORDER BY D.DATA_NO ASC) AS PREV_NO, LAG(D.DATA_NM) OVER (ORDER BY D.DATA_NO ASC) AS PREV_TTL, LEAD(D.DATA_NO) OVER (ORDER BY D.DATA_NO ASC) AS NEXT_NO, LEAD(D.DATA_NM) OVER (ORDER BY D.DATA_NO ASC) AS NEXT_TTL FROM DATA D LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON (D.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID) WHERE D.DATA_DEL_YN = 0 ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN FILE_DETAIL FD ON (A.FILE_ID = FD.FILE_ID) WHERE A.DATA_NO = #{dataNo}

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.DATA_TYPE = '4' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, A.DATA_NO DESC) RNUM , A.DATA_NO, A.DATA_NM, A.DATA_DT, A.DATA_CNT, A.FILE_ID, A.DATA_TYPE, A.DATA_SHARE_YN , B.EMP_NM , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FILE_DETAIL FD WHERE FD.FILE_ID = A.FILE_ID) AS FILE_COUNT , (SELECT LISTAGG(FD.FILE_DTL_O_NM, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY FD.FILE_DTL_ID) FROM FILE_DETAIL FD WHERE FD.FILE_ID = A.FILE_ID) AS FILE_NAMES FROM DATA A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON(A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID) WHERE A.DATA_DEL_YN = 0
) T WHERE T.RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow} ORDER BY T.RNUM ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DATA A LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON(A.EMP_ID = B.EMP_ID) WHERE A.DATA_DEL_YN = 0
